summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for Medikal Africa website. All new features (How It Works page, Team page, time-series charts, footer redesign, navigation updates) are working correctly.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section, pipeline animation, stats, features, partners, and CTA sections
Navigation bar shows all links: Home, Platform, How It Works, AMR, Team, Research, and Request Demo button
How It Works page (/how-it-works) - hero section with 'From Hospital to Intelligence' title loads correctly
How It Works page - 5-step navigation bar with Data Collection, Security Layer, AI Processing, AMR Detection, Intelligence Output
How It Works page - step navigation is interactive and updates detail section with SVG visualizations
How It Works page - Previous/Next buttons work for step navigation
How It Works page - tech grid shows 96.2% accuracy, <200ms latency, AES-256, HL7 FHIR
Team page (/team) - hero section with 'Built by African Innovators' title
Team page - 3 founder cards (Olivier Niyonshima - CEO, Tresor Yubahwe - COO, Amen Divine Ikamba - Head of Product)
Team page - mission section with 70% AMR reduction goal and stats (54 countries, 2M+ lives, 500+ facilities)
Team page - advisors grid with 3 advisor cards
Team page - join section with Partner and Careers buttons
Platform page (/platform) - hero, architecture diagram, 6 feature cards
AMR page (/amr) - hero, AMR stats (4.95M, 1.27M, 10M, $100T), detection flow diagram
Research page (/research) - hero, stats, strategic partners logos
Footer - status bar with 3 green dots (API Status, 45 Facilities, Last Sync)
Footer - social icons (Twitter, LinkedIn, Email) present and linked
Footer - updated links including How It Works and Team in footer navigation
Footer - copyright 2026 displayed correctly
Pipeline section on homepage - pipeline flow animation with 5 stages
Pipeline section - visualization panels (AI Model Activity, AMR Hotspots, Live Metrics)
Pipeline section - 5 country hotspots appear on scene 4+ (Kenya, Uganda, Nigeria, Rwanda, South Africa)
Pipeline section - clicking Nigeria hotspot triggers time-series chart panel with 12-month trend data
Time-series chart panel shows country name, risk level badge (HIGH RISK for Nigeria), pathogen (K. pneumoniae), and line chart
Time-series chart close button works correctly
Mobile navigation - hamburger menu button visible on mobile viewport (390px)
Mobile menu - opens with all page links (Home, Platform, How It Works, AMR Intelligence, Team, Research, Request Demo)
Mobile menu - close button works correctly
seed_data_creation: None - All data is hardcoded in frontend
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (How It Works, Team page, time-series charts) fully functional. Pipeline animation auto-cycles through 5 scenes. Country hotspots only appear on scene 4+. Click on any hotspot to show time-series chart panel. Mobile menu tested and working. Footer has been redesigned with status bar and updated links.
